info.name: NomadeoPMS
info.description:
Complete API collection for NomadeoPMS — multi-tenant PMS for adventure travel businesses.

**Quick start:**
1. Set the `base_url` variable (default: `http://localhost:8001/api/v1`)
2. Run **Auth → Login** — `{{token}}` is saved automatically
3. Run **Organizers → Create Organizer** (super_admin) — `{{organizer_id}}` is saved
4. Continue through each folder in order; create requests auto-save IDs into variables

**Auto-saved variables:** `token`, `organizer_id`, `property_id`, `property_slug`, `room_type_id`, `unit_id`, `program_id`, `add_on_id`, `customer_id`, `booking_id`, `pricing_rule_id`, `discount_id`, `availability_rule_id`, `booking_rule_id`, `payment_rule_id`, `review_id`, `staff_user_id`, `integration_token`

**Default super admin:** `admin@nomadeo.es` / `secret`

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Surf Paradise Camp",
    "email": "surf@paradise.com",
    "slug": "surf-paradise",
    "country": "PT",
    "currency": "EUR",
    "timezone": "Europe/Lisbon",
    "locale": "en",
    "description": "The best surf camp in Portugal"
}

item.name: Properties
item.description: Manage properties (surf camps, yoga retreats, etc.) for the current organizer.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Main Surf House",
    "slug": "main-surf-house",
    "type": "surf_camp",
    "address": "Rua da Praia 1",
    "city": "Peniche",
    "country": "PT",
    "currency": "EUR",
    "timezone": "Europe/Lisbon",
    "description": "Our flagship surf camp on the Atlantic coast",
    "amenities": ["wifi", "pool", "surf_board_rental"]
}

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Manage room types and bookable units within a property.

body.raw:
{
    "property_id": "{{property_id}}",
    "name": "Shared Dorm 6-Bed",
    "category": "shared_dorm",
    "max_capacity": 6,
    "description": "Comfortable shared dorm with sea view"
}

item.name: Programs
item.description: Manage programs (surf camps, yoga retreats, etc.) and their add-ons.

body.raw:
{
    "property_id": "{{property_id}}",
    "name": "7-Day Beginner Surf Camp",
    "type": "surf_camp",
    "duration_days": 7,
    "description": "All-inclusive beginner surf camp including accommodation, meals and daily lessons"
}

{
    "property_id": "{{property_id}}",
    "name": "Private Surf Lesson (1h)",
    "category": "surf_class",
    "price": 60.00,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "description": "One-on-one surf coaching with a certified instructor",
    "max_per_booking": 5
}

item.name: Availability
item.description: Availability calendar, check endpoint, availability rules, and booking rules.

item.name: Pricing
item.description: Price calculation, pricing rules (season rates), and discount codes.

query.description: Optional — remove if not testing discounts

body.raw:
{
    "booking_id": "{{booking_id}}",
    "customer_id": "{{customer_id}}",
    "overall_rating": 5,
    "accommodation_rating": 5,
    "program_rating": 4,
    "staff_rating": 5,
    "value_rating": 4,
    "comment": "Absolutely amazing experience! The instructors were world-class and the accommodation was perfect.",
    "is_published": false
}

item.name: Bookings
item.description: Full booking lifecycle. Create bookings AFTER creating customers and units.

body.raw:
{
    "property_id": "{{property_id}}",
    "customer_id": "{{customer_id}}",
    "check_in_date": "2027-08-01",
    "check_out_date": "2027-08-08",
    "guests": 2,
    "total_price": 595.00,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "source": "direct",
    "notes": "Guest is a beginner surfer. Prefers ground floor room.",
    "unit_ids": [
        {
            "unit_id": "{{unit_id}}",
            "guests": 2,
            "price_per_night": 85.00
        }
    ]
}

item.name: Payments
item.description: Record payments against bookings and manage payment rules (deposit schedules).

item.name: Staff
item.description: Invite and manage staff members within the organizer account.

item.name: Reporting
item.description: Business analytics. All reports require start_date and end_date.

item.name: Integration
item.description: Nomadeo marketplace integration. Two sub-folders: Token Management (JWT) and Marketplace Endpoints (integration token).

item.name: Token Management (JWT Auth)
item.description: Create integration tokens using normal JWT auth. The returned `token` value is shown once — save it as {{integration_token}}.

exec: console.log('integration_token saved. Store securely — shown once only.');

item.name: Marketplace Endpoints (Integration Token)
item.description: These endpoints use {{integration_token}} as the Bearer token instead of {{token}}. Run 'Create Integration Token' first.
